note: Filters use existing GPS-event speed/course dynamics. APdrone open-field logs lack attitude/wind, so rows identify trim/drag candidates and diagnostic bounds rather than fitting a final CdA.
Relaxed near-steady filter for sparse high-speed data.
High-speed straight-ish events; not steady trim because along-track acceleration is allowed up to 3 m/s^2.
Straight-ish deceleration events; apparent drag assumes zero horizontal thrust and is only diagnostic.
Fastest straight-ish deceleration events above 16 m/s.
